name: Skullbreaker
extractionNotes: Every skill (plot, clash, and ultimate) is preceded on the card by a target icon from icons.json skillIcons: skill_self, skill_friendly, skill_area, or skill_enemy. Stored as the skillIcon field.

Skill range / accuracy / damage are stored only in statProfiles. Use figuresInHex "-" when the card shows a single stat row; use 1, 2, or 3 when multiple rows match follower figures in the hex (max 3).
Champion and follower stats always use plotSpeed and clashSpeed (never a single speed field), even when both values are the same.
Follower stats are plotSpeed, clashSpeed, dodge, protection, and health from the stat row on the follower card. Unit count (top-right icon) is stored separately as units.
If card text says "Must target a follower" or "Must target a champion", remove it from text and store as mustTarget (follower, champion, or -).
Icon-only boon effects: skill_self → "Gain {boon_id}", skill_friendly → "Grant {boon_id}". Icon-only blight or "Hit Effect:" blight → "Inflict {blight_id}".

factionTrait.name: Slayer Champion
factionTrait.text: A slayer moves the turn token +1 step when they knock out an enemy champion.

uniqueTraits.name: Out Of My Way!
uniqueTraits.text: Skullbreaker may move through small followers' hexes but cannot end his movement on those hexes.

ultimate.name: Finisher
ultimate.text: Clash phase only. Skullbreaker may make up to 3 skill actions.

clashSkills.name: I Smell Blood...
clashSkills.text: Skullbreaker's Jawblade skill gains +4 {accuracy} and 'Hit Effect: The target gains 1 wound.' this activation.

clashSkills.name: Go For The Belly!
clashSkills.text: Skullbreaker's Jawblade skill gains +2 {damage} and 'Hit Effect: Move target up to 2 hexes.' this activation.

clashSkills.name: Jawblade
clashSkills.text: After using this skill, Skullbreaker gains {move_boon}.

traits.name: Set Up The Boss!
traits.text: When a Tooth Bearer damages an enemy, Skullbreaker may gain a boon of your choice or move 1 hex.

plotSkills.name: Rush
plotSkills.text: Choose a hex. Each Tooth Bearer in that hex may move up to 2 hexes.

plotSkills.name: Feral Howl
plotSkills.text: This skill has +1 {accuracy} for each Tooth Bearer adjacent to the target. Hit Effect: Move target up to 1 hex.

clashSkills.name: Club Bash
clashSkills.text: Hit Effect: The target gains 1 wound.
